privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically-generated exoplanet data created at runtime with 50 planets. All metadata paths are verified: CSV input at /home/ga/Desktop/exoplanets.csv, Blender output at /home/ga/BlenderProjects/exoplanet_viz.blend. The collection name is StarCluster and planets are scaled by factor 0.2 (radius * 0.2). Synthetic data includes planet IDs 101-150, positions within a 30×30×30 cube centered at origin, radii from 0.5-2.5 Earth units, and 20% habitability rate.
